Subject: RE: An AMU student
Message:
Larry,
    Given your background and association with the Naval Reserve, I would
recommend that as your quickest route to intelligence analysis.  However, do
not limit yourself to DIA and NSA.  Go on-line to www.firstgov.org   and
look at all of the US intelligence community employment opportunities,
including the FBI , CIA, and Treasury, et al.  Your language skills and
foreign travel will be especially valuable.

    I would be pleased to advise you as you pursue a career change.
